videoSnippet.title: World Champion vs The Chosen One || Chennai Grand Masters 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Firouzja, Alireza (2749) - Gukesh D (2717) *
Quantbox Chennai Grand Masters 2026 (Chess.com) [02] 2026.07.16
C88 Ruy Lopez, closed, 7...O-O

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bb5 a6 4.Ba4 Nf6 5.O-O Be7 6.Re1 b5 7.Bb3 O-O 8.h3 Bb7 9.d3 d6 10.Bd2 Nb8 11.a4 Nbd7 12.Nc3 c6 13.axb5 axb5 14.Rxa8 Qxa8 15.Nh4 g6 16.Bh6 Re8 17.Qf3 Bf8 18.Bxf8 Rxf8 19.Qe3 Qd8 20.Qh6 Nc5 21.Ba2 Bc8 22.Nf3 b4 23.Nd1 Qa5 24.Bc4 b3 25.Bxb3 Nxb3 26.cxb3 Qb4 27.Ne3 Qxb3 28.Qh4 Nh5 29.Qe7 Nf4 30.Qxd6 Nxd3 31.Rb1 f6 32.Nd2 Qb5 33.Ndc4 Nf4 34.Kh2 Be6 35.Rc1 Bxc4 36.Nxc4 Rf7 37.Rc2 Qb3 38.Ne3 Kg7 39.Qxc6 Qb4 40.Qc4 Rb7 41.Qc8 Rf7 42.Qe8 Re7 43.Qd8 Ne6 44.Nd5 Nxd8 45.Nxb4 Rb7 46.Nd5 Ne6 47.b4 f5 48.Rc6 Kf7 49.b5 Nd4 50.Rc7+ Rxc7 51.Nxc7 Ke7 52.b6 Kd6 53.Nd5 Kc6 54.f3 fxe4 55.fxe4 Nb3 56.Kg3 Nd2 57.Nf6 Kxb6 58.Kf2 h5 59.Nd7+ Kc7 60.Nxe5 Nxe4+ 61.Ke3 Nf6 62.Nxg6 Kd6 63.Kf4 Nd5+ 64.Kg5 Ne3 65.Nf4 Ke5 66.g3 Ke4 67.Nxh5 Kf3 68.g4 Nd1 69.Nf6
